summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FOMO Crypto Intelligence Terminal. Backend API tests show 72.7% success rate with key features working. Frontend dashboard loads correctly with all major UI components functional. Knowledge Graph search successfully finds all target VC funds (a16z, Paradigm, Jump Crypto, Sequoia). Discovery page shows proper health check statuses. Main issues: health check timeout and missing graph visualization endpoints.

flaky_endpoints.issue: POST request times out after 30 seconds
flaky_endpoints.impact: Health check functionality not working in UI

missing_endpoints.impact: Graph visualization cannot load node data
Graph visualization cannot load edge data

integration_issues.issue: Health Check button may timeout due to backend issue
Graph tab may not display network due to missing backend endpoints

passed_tests: Basic API health check working (200 OK)
Graph statistics API returns correct data (281 nodes, 499 edges)
Discovery sources API returns 34 sources with proper status fields
WebSocket status API working with all channels configured
Knowledge Graph search finds all target VC funds (a16z, Paradigm, Jump Crypto, Sequoia)
Dashboard loads with proper FOMO branding and layout
Stats cards display current metrics (0 Entities, 0 Events, 15 Investors, 0 Unlocks)
Pipeline Status section shows all 4 components (Scheduler, Parsers, News, Discovery)
Parser Jobs section displays multiple job cards with correct statuses
Intelligence Engines section shows 3 engines all marked as Active
Navigation between Dashboard, Discovery, Graph, and other tabs working
Data Sources Registry displays sources with status indicators (Active, Key Required, Offline)

high_priority: Fix /api/discovery/sources/health-check endpoint timeout issue - currently takes >30s to check 34 sources
Implement missing graph visualization endpoints: /api/graph/nodes and /api/graph/edges
medium_priority: Investigate why Entities and Events counts are 0 - may need data initialization
Optimize health check performance to handle 34+ external source checks faster

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (UI loads and displays correctly, minor integration issues)
